nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: Partly cloudy. Low around 56, with temperatures rising to around 58 overnight. East wind around 3 mph.

nws.name: Tuesday
nws.shortForecast: Mostly Sunny then Slight Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of showers and thunderstorms after 5pm. Some of the storms could be severe. Mostly sunny. High near 92, with temperatures falling to around 88 in the afternoon. Southeast wind 5 to 26 mph, with gusts as high as 40 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

nws.name: Tuesday Night
nws.shortForecast: Showers And Thunderstorms Likely then Mostly Cloudy
nws.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms likely before 9pm. Some of the storms could be severe. Mostly cloudy. Low around 58, with temperatures rising to around 61 overnight. South wind 5 to 22 mph, with gusts as high as 33 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

nws.name: Wednesday
nws.shortForecast: Chance Showers And Thunderstorms then Mostly Sunny
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms before 11am. Mostly sunny, with a high near 74. West wind 9 to 21 mph, with gusts as high as 31 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%.

nws.name: Wednesday Night
nws.shortForecast: Slight Chance Showers And Thunderstorms then Partly Cloudy
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of showers and thunderstorms before 7pm. Partly cloudy, with a low around 51. West wind 10 to 20 mph, with gusts as high as 29 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

nws.name: Thursday
nws.detailedForecast: Rain showers likely between 7am and 4pm, then showers and thunderstorms likely. Partly sunny, with a high near 70. West wind 16 to 24 mph, with gusts as high as 36 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%.

nws.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms likely before 7pm. Partly cloudy, with a low around 50. West wind 10 to 23 mph, with gusts as high as 35 mph.
